"[144] S3 VIA LL ALL INTENTIONAL ACT / NEG 20002 / 57775Y1 - 16 WHI FORD F150 - GRANITE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ( FIRST VV) / 1ST V V- WHI FORD F150 PUSHED INTO THE 32239K3- 23 FORD PK IN THE GRAVEL BUT TIRE TO TIRE CONTACT (DOESN'T WANT TO BE INVD -NEG SEVERE DMG) / SUSP THEN STOPPED VEH IN # 1 LN WHEN SSAC OF DUTY CHP OFCR HAWKINS WAS RR ENDED - DRVR OF TOYT YARIS TRIED TO HELP HIM SUSP -ENEDED UP IN 415 WITH SUSP STEALING HIS VEH / SUSP CONT GOT INVD IN HV WITH UNK CHAMPAIGNE CHEV SLV (UNK IF ANY TC BTWN 2 -UNK EXITED CONT ON NEG CHP CONTACT -ALL PER WIT) / ONCE IN STOCKTON AREA -JNO WOODBRIDGE HIT WHI CHEV SLV POSS MISTAKE IT FRM THE FIRST CHAMP CHEV SLV THAT EXITED OFF FWY - WHI CHEV SLV -14479H3 (PREGNANT XRAY AND HUSBAND) AND RAMMED THEM OFF VEH 6-8 TIMES RESULTING TO HIT GRAIL AND O/T ENDED UP IN FRONTAGE RD / SUSP TRIED TO STEAL THE CHEV SLV - BUT RAN OFF TO RV CENTER [Shared]"
